title: 2 fallen cybersecurity stocks for patient bargain hunters
text: Cybersecurity stocks have been strong performers this earnings season. Many leaders are higher priced stocks in the $100 to over $300 range.

title: MGM RESORTS REVEALS NEW DETAILS ABOUT BELLAGIO FOUNTAIN CLUB EXPERIENCE AT FORMULA 1® HEINEKEN SILVER LAS VEGAS GRAND PRIX
text: Bellagio Fountain Club to Host Official Las Vegas Grand Prix Winner's Stage Culinary legends José Andrés, Christina Tosi, Alain Ducasse, Rainer Becker join Bellagio Fountain Club's superstar chef lineup Bellagio Fountain Club will offer guests exclusive live race coverage in Dolby Vision courtesy of Dolby and powered by LG Electronics' award-winning OLED evo TVs LAS VEGAS , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) is sharing new details surrounding the Bellagio Fountain Club , which will take center stage during the FORMULA 1 HEINEKEN SILVER LAS VEGAS GRAND PRIX with special events and experiences before, during and after the race, November 16-18. Throughout the weekend, the Las Vegas Grand Prix Winner's Stage at the Bellagio Fountain Club will be home to performances by entertainers from MGM Resorts' entertainment portfolio before welcoming the race's top drivers for post-race commentary on Saturday night.

title: Lío Ibiza Returns with Exclusive Takeover of Bellagio's Mayfair Supper Club During Formula 1 Heineken Silver Las Vegas Grand Prix
text: Iconic Ibizan cabaret delivers next act of show-stopping Fountain-side entertainment November 12 - 22 LAS VEGAS , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Ibiza's most exclusive cabaret dining experience is set to make its grand return to the U.S. during the FORMULA 1 HEINEKEN SILVER LAS VEGAS GRAND PRIX when Lío takes over The Mayfair Supper Club, Bellagio's acclaimed restaurant and entertainment destination. The Mayfair will transform into the Ibizan spectacle November 12-22 at 8 p.m.

title: Thousands of casino workers go on strike in Detroit
text: Casino workers in Detroit are seeking higher wages and better working conditions as the cost of living has increased in recent years.

title: Detroit casino workers go on strike after failed talks
text: Thousands of hospitality workers in Detroit walked off the job on Tuesday after unions called for strikes at casinos operated by MGM Grand Detroit operated by MGM Resorts International , MotorCity Casino and Hollywood Casino at Greektown operated by Penn Entertainment.

title: Should You Pick MGM Resorts Over Boston Scientific Stock For Better Returns?
text: Given its better prospects, we believe MGM Resorts stock (NYSE: MGM) is a better pick than Boston Scientific stock (NYSE: BSX).

title: MGM Resorts: A High-Risk High-Reward Opportunity
text: MGM Resorts shares have fallen almost 30% from their 2023 share price high of $51.35 on July 31st. The current share price is greatly affected by the September 14, 2023, Scattered Spider hacking group announcement that had infiltrated MGM's systems, creating significant operational and gaming system outages. Regardless, my five-step analysis of macro, sector, valuation, technical, and brand discovery posits that MGM is positioned for growth from increased post-Covid tourism, sports betting, and online gaming.

title: Where Will MGM Resorts Stock Be in 5 Years?
text: MGM Resorts is well-known for its famous casinos spread around Las Vegas. But it could also open Japan's first integrated casino resort by the decade's end.

title: MGM Resorts International Announces Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release Date
text: LAS VEGAS , Oct. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") will release its financial results for the third quarter 2023 after the market closes on Wednesday, November 8, 2023. MGM Resorts will host a conference call that day at 5:00 p.m.

title: Google and Amazon Hit by Fresh Cyberattacks. These Stocks Could Benefit.
text: Google, Amazon and Cloudflare have all recently been victims of attacks just weeks just weeks after casino operators MGM Resorts (MGM) and Caesars Entertainment (CZR) were targeted.

title: BetMGM and Inspired Entertainment Launch MGM Bonus City, Revolutionary Hybrid Dealer® Game
text: First-of-its-kind online game available only at BetMGM JERSEY CITY, N.J. , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, a leading iGaming and sports betting operator, and Inspired Entertainment, a leading B2B provider of gaming content, technology, hardware and services, announced today the launch of MGM Bonus City, innovative online Hybrid Dealer game.

title: Las Vegas casino stocks are flirting with a bear market. That might be a sign an economic downturn is coming.
text: Casino stocks are slumping – and that could be bad news for the US economy. The sector plunging could be a signal that Americans are about to start spending less.

title: MGM Resorts racks up $100M cost from cyberattack
text: MGM Resorts International has put a number on the cost of the disruptive cyberattack it experienced in September. It estimated the damage at $100 million.

title: MGM Resorts loses over $100M after refusing to pay ransom to end cyberattack
text: MGM suffered from a 10-day cyberattack last month that's set to cost the company more than $100 million for the third quarter. Despite the financial loss, MGM reportedly refused to pay ransom.

title: Clorox and MGM Resorts aren't the only companies dealing with cyberattack damage
text: It has been a very eventful couple of weeks for cyberattack-related news among major corporations.

title: MGM Resorts (MGM) Q3 Earnings to be Hit by Cybersecurity Issue
text: MGM Resorts' (MGM) third-quarter 2023 earnings are likely to be hurt by cybersecurity issue. However, the company is optimistic about a robust fourth quarter.

title: MGM expects US$100m hit from cyberattack
text: Casino operator MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) expects to face a US$100 million hit from a cyberattack that shut down its computers for 10 days last month. Las Vegas-based MGM updated on Thursday that the attack would incur the hefty hit to its third-quarter results, with a "minimal" impact on its fourth quarter.

title: MGM expects hundred million dollar hit from cyberattack
text: Casino operator MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) expects to face a US$100 million hit from a cyberattack that shut down its computers for ten days last month. Las Vegas-based MGM updated on Thursday that the attack would incur the hefty hit to its third-quarter results, while results for the three months to September could also be affected.

title: Casino giant MGM expects $100 million hit from hack that led to data breach
text: MGM Resorts International said on Thursday a cyberattack last month that disrupted its operations would cause a $100 million hit to its third-quarter results, as it works to restore its systems.

title: MGM sees $100 million cost from recent cybersecurity attack
text: MGM Resorts International shares dropped 1% in the extended session Thursday after the hospitality company said that the recent cyberattack that hampered its operations is going to cost some $100 million.

title: MGM RESORTS UPDATE ON RECENT CYBERSECURITY ISSUE
text: LAS VEGAS , Oct. 5, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") recently disclosed that the Company identified a cybersecurity issue affecting certain of its systems and that its investigation into the issue was ongoing.  On or around September 29, 2023, MGM Resorts determined that an unauthorized third party obtained personal information of some of its customers on September 11, 2023.

title: BetMGM Casino Is the 2023 American Gambling Awards Online Casino of the Year
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The American Gambling Awards is pleased to announce BetMGM (NYSE: MGM), a leading iGaming and sports betting operator, is the 2023 “Online Casino of the Year.” The American Gambling Awards are produced by Gambling.com Group Limited (Nasdaq: GAMB) (“Gambling.com Group” or the “Group”), a leading provider of player acquisition services for the regulated global online gambling industry. BetMGM strengthened its position as the leading iGaming operator in the United States.

title: BetMGM to Hold Business Update Event
text: LAS VEGAS , Oct. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, LLC ("BetMGM"), one of the leading sports betting and iGaming operators across the U.S., jointly owned by MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts") and Entain plc (LSE: ENT) ("Entain") will host a business update for analysts and investors at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Monday, December 4, 2023.

title: MGM Resorts Returns as the Presenting Sponsor of the Annual Las Vegas Pride Parade
text: LAS VEGAS , Oct. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") proudly returns for the 17th consecutive year as the presenting sponsor of the annual Las Vegas Pride Parade, scheduled for Friday, October 6 in downtown Las Vegas. As a long-time sponsor of the annual Pride Parade since 2003, MGM Resorts continues to amplify its support for the LGBTQ+ community year after year.
